title: Sky Machina Tweaks
description: A mod making custom changes the CreateSifter mod aswell as adding custom items and blocks made specifcally for the Sky Machina modpack
body:
What this mod does: Adds all the custom blocks and items wanted/needed for the modpack. It also makes the CreateSifter mod work how its wanted for the modpack

Features: Blocks, Items, tweaks and missing things like showing the used mesh in the sifter to waila

 

This mod is required both client side and server side as it adds things to the game

 

Modpack Usage: Made for the Sky Machina modpack. But feel free to use it in any pack.
